name: Fix RelayHQ Web UI — Make It Actually Usable
objective: Diagnose and fix the RelayHQ Nuxt 3 frontend so it becomes an operational control plane, not just a static informational display. The API and vault data are working correctly — the problems are all in the UI layer.
exit_criteria: Dashboard (/) shows live metrics cards (Projects/Tasks/Approvals counts) with a prominent amber CTA when approvals are pending
Dashboard links directly to the board and approvals queue with clear hierarchy
Board task cards show priority left-border colors (critical=red, high=amber, medium=default)
Board task cards show a visually distinct 'Waiting Approval' state (amber left border + badge)
Board task cards show 'Stale' badge when isStale is true
Navigation 'Audit' item goes to a real page (not a task page)
Task creation form accessible from board/project page via '+ New Task' button
Tasks can be moved to the next column via a button on the task detail page
Stale detection is correct — task-001 has a recent heartbeat but is showing as stale (bug)
